cross_scene_arcs.title: Nadia Relationship Dynamics
cross_scene_arcs.arc_summary: Alexei's relationship with Nadia evolves from communal bonding and intimate moments to coercive control, pregnancy shock, reassurance attempts, and violent confrontation.
cross_scene_arcs.start_state: Bonded through music and veteran camaraderie.
cross_scene_arcs.end_state: Hostile confrontation with Nadia biting him and relationship in disarray.
cross_scene_arcs.unresolved_issue: The future of their relationship and Nadia's acceptance of his reassurances.

cross_scene_arcs.title: Escalating Conflict with John
cross_scene_arcs.arc_summary: Alexei's interactions with John progress from inducing anxiety to hostage-taking, coercive control, and physical violence.
cross_scene_arcs.start_state: John is anxious and confused by Alexei's behavior.
cross_scene_arcs.end_state: Physical fight where John attacks Alexei with a guitar.
cross_scene_arcs.unresolved_issue: The outcome of the violent conflict and John's next moves.

cross_scene_arcs.title: Journey to Personal Clarity
cross_scene_arcs.arc_summary: Alexei moves from shock at pregnancy news and confusion to professing commitment and achieving clarity and happiness about his desires.
cross_scene_arcs.start_state: Shocked and questioning ability to handle a baby.
cross_scene_arcs.end_state: Happy and clear on what he wants.
cross_scene_arcs.unresolved_issue: Whether this clarity persists after the confrontation with Nadia and John.

cross_scene_arcs.title: Online Submission to Airport Meeting
cross_scene_arcs.arc_summary: John submits his details online to find a partner and meets Nadia at the airport, but their initial interaction is awkward and strained.
cross_scene_arcs.start_state: John initiates search for a partner via online submission.
cross_scene_arcs.end_state: John and Nadia are together at the arrivals gate, standing in silence.

cross_scene_arcs.title: Deteriorating Relationship and Violent Deception
cross_scene_arcs.arc_summary: John's attempt to transport Nadia home leads to communication issues, a forced sexual encounter, discovery of surveillance, violent coercion by Alexei, and the realization of being duped, culminating in emotional breakdown and captivity.
cross_scene_arcs.start_state: Car stranded on motorway hard shoulder after emergency stop.
cross_scene_arcs.end_state: John is emotionally broken, tied to a bidet, and has lost the engagement ring.
cross_scene_arcs.unresolved_issue: John remains captive and must deal with the aftermath of the deception.

cross_scene_arcs.title: Airport Departure and New Partnership
cross_scene_arcs.arc_summary: At the airport, John and Nadia prepare to part ways with money, but Nadia reveals her real name as Sophia, and they board a plane together, forming a new partnership.
cross_scene_arcs.start_state: John has the money cases and is preparing to depart; Nadia takes some money and waits.
cross_scene_arcs.end_state: John and Sophia are on board the plane together.
cross_scene_arcs.unresolved_issue: What happens after boarding and the future of their partnership.

cross_scene_arcs.title: Nadia's Evolving Relationship with John
cross_scene_arcs.arc_summary: From initial meeting at the airport to boarding a flight together, Nadia and John's relationship progresses through awkward introductions, a symbolic ring gesture, identity revelations, confrontations, and eventual reconciliation.
cross_scene_arcs.start_state: Nadia arrives in England and meets John at the airport.
cross_scene_arcs.end_state: Nadia, now known as Sophia, boards a flight with John.
cross_scene_arcs.unresolved_issue: The stability of their relationship after past conflicts and identity deception.

cross_scene_arcs.title: Nadia's Relationship with Alexei and Pregnancy
cross_scene_arcs.arc_summary: After meeting at her birthday party, Nadia and Alexei experience conflict during a lake outing, but later she announces her pregnancy, leading to a mutual agreement to stop using drugs.
cross_scene_arcs.start_state: Nadia meets Alexei at her birthday party in John's house.
cross_scene_arcs.end_state: Nadia is pregnant and committed to a drug-free life with Alexei.
cross_scene_arcs.unresolved_issue: Alexei's full acceptance of the pregnancy and their ability to follow through on their commitment.
